source_pr.title: planner/core: convert decimal type for mpp join before shuffling.
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: https://github.com/pingcap/tics/issues/1291

Problem Summary: If the type of join keys for mpp join is decimal, and their precision or scale are different, TiFlash should do an extra convertion before shuffling.

### What is changed and how it works?

What's Changed:
We do an extra check in TiDB planner and generate the converting project operator manully. There are two cases that need doing convertion:
- the scales (in TiDB it's called decimal, meaning the length after the point) are different.
- the precisions change. If the change means a underlying type convertion in TiFlash(for example, from int32 to int64), we must make converting project in advance 



### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test (pending more tests)

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- planner/core: convert decimal type for mpp join before shuffling.

symptoms: tk.MustQuery("select t1.c1 from t t1 join t t2 on t1.c1 = t2.c1 order by t1.c1").Check(testkit.Rows("1.00000", "1.00001", "1.00010")) (executor/tiflash_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustQuery("select t1.c1 from t t1 join t t2 on t1.c1 = t2.c1 order by t1.c1").Check(testkit.Rows("1.00000", "1.00001", "1.00010")) (executor/tiflash_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: tk.MustQuery("select t1.c1 from t t1 join t t2 on t1.c1 = t2.c1 order by t1.c1").Check(testkit.Rows("1.00000", "1.00001", "1.00010")) (executor/tiflash_test.go).
fix_pattern: tk.MustQuery("select t1.c1 from t t1 join t t2 on t1.c1 = t2.c1 order by t1.c1").Check(testkit.Rows("1.00000", "1.00001", "1.00010")) (executor/tiflash_test.go)

evidence: evidence: tk.MustQuery("select t1.c1 from t t1 join t t2 on t1.c1 = t2.c1 order by t1.c1").Check(testkit.Rows("1.00000", "1.00001", "1.00010")) (executor/tiflash_test.go)
